titleStmt.title: SII 24.88: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 88. (A.R. No. 138 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of land under orders of Bhuvaninārāyaṇa Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Neḍuñjēri to Karumāṇikkam Ādittadēvaṉ alias Chēdirāyar for raising a garden. The inscription is dated in the 40th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayar muṉaik kon=ta ḷavaracar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip poṟ pari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭi tenticai temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvai tanimaiyum tavira punitarti rumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyir cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyāka munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāru vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toruñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun=tanātutiruniḻalveṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ[ ṟivān=tara] ttup pūpālar[tiṟai viṭu tanta kalañcoṟikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭa tan ponnakar puṟattiṭai kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkula piṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavun veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina vīramum kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻan ṟuṭaintoṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷum talaivirit pannāḷiṭṭap pala pala mutukum payantetir māṟina jayapperuntiruvum
Continued on the vertical face of the tier.vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkariniraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaik koṇṭīṇṭiyapukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalam koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poru parittalaṅkaḷumtantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñcenaiyai Evip pañcavaraivarum porutamarkkaḷattañci veru neḷit toṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijayastampam ticai torum niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiḻ potiyilum matta veṅkaripaṭu maiyyaccayyamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kaṭalmalai nāṭṭuḷḷa caraverellām tani vicumpeṟa māveṟiya civaniṭattumaiyenat tiyākavalli vaḷuṭan naṅkai viṟṟiruntaruḷiya maratilatam Eḻicaivalli Eḻulakamu(mu)ṭaiyāḷ viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirāja(kovirāja)kesaripanmarāna tripuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpa pāṇṭikulācani Continuation is peeled off and lost.
ñceykiṟa neṭuñcerikkuṭaiyān puvaninārāyaṇa muven=taveḷār Evalpaṭi Āḻvārkanmikaḷom śrī rttirunāṭuṭaiyān Amutum perumpuliyūr vaṇṭuvarāpati nampiyum varakūr tiru m śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan man Ārāvamutum kavi n cempoṟ pāratāyan kecuvan Aṟivaṟi yānum Āritan cikāri maṟṟum sabhaik kaṇakku ṣṇavakkaṇakku śrī vayi ṟippuṟamāna kaṟkuṭiyil kāl pāṟkellai Irāmateva kellai ceṅkirayār tiruttuvitta kaṇṭanārāyaṇaviḷākattukku vaṭakkum miṇa yirāma viḷākattukku Ivvi mukkāle munṟu
ṅkalattukku nir pāyum peruvākkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟ kellai meṟpaṭiyān vāykkā sirājentracoḻa viḷākattu ḻvār jāti vitta Utta ? marālaya viḷākattut teṟ nilam kālu māka nilam ne reḷaṉ Āḻvār ci paṇṭāra Oṭukkina Innilam ṟuvarākavum Inni- lattu llu Āḻvār śrī paṇṭārattu ḷukku raiyāka Āḷ nālvarkku kku kulaikāppu cen nīr veṭṭi tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai ceykiṟa kulacekaradāsanum Ivanum pavikkappeṟu Ipparicu
ṅkuṭaiyān karumāṇikkam Ātittatevanāta cetirājarkku cantirātittavar cella Aṭuttukkuṭu śrīvayiṣṇavak kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ārāva perum puliyūr vaṇṭu Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkaneḻuttu pāratāyan cirāman mutineḻuttu Ālaṅkuṭi ṭi dāsan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku neḻuttu yāṇṭu nāṟpatāvatuThe rest is damaged badly.
Digital edition of SII 24.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
